command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/setup_hermes.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -e

# 1. Update model in config.yaml
python3 - << 'PYEOF'
import yaml
path = '/home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml'
with open(path) as f:
    c = yaml.safe_load(f)
c['model']['default'] = 'qwen3.5:9b'
c['providers']['ollama']['default_model'] = 'qwen3.5:9b'
with open(path, 'w') as f:
    yaml.dump(c, f, default_flow_style=False, allow_unicode=True)
print('config updated')
PYEOF

# 2. Create systemd user service
mkdir -p /home/jose/.config/systemd/user
cat > /home/jose/.config/systemd/user/hermes-agent.service << 'SVCEOF'
[Unit]
Description=Hermes Agent Gateway
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=simple
WorkingDirectory=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent
ExecStart=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes gateway start
Restart=always
RestartSec=5s
Environment=HOME=/home/jose

[Install]
WantedBy=default.target
SVCEOF

# 3. Enable linger so user services survive logout
sudo loginctl enable-linger jose

# 4. Enable and start
systemctl --user daemon-reload
systemctl --user enable hermes-agent
systemctl --user start hermes-agent
sleep 5
systemctl --user status hermes-agent --no-pager | head -10
SHEOF
bash /tmp/setup_hermes.sh"
